author: codex-release-agent

patch.value: Prepare, verify, publish, and document the next pm CLI release from the current main branch.

Previous-version tracker data migrates without loss; CHANGELOG.md and generated release notes cover changes since v2026.3.12; release workflow is documented and stable without paid GitHub features; npm/npx and bun/bunx install paths are verified after publication.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: ran pm context --limit 10,pm search 'release changelog publishing migration compatibility' --limit 10,pm list-open --limit 20,and pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Only closed release chores pm-lz4m/pm-1h88 matched the release scope; active parent lineage selected as pm-23me -> pm-3fti for latest-build audit/release work.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release must be blocked until a temp project created with the previous published CLI version is verified against the current build for automatic migration/backward compatibility.

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/ci-workflow-contract.spec.ts tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t 'release workflow|auto-selects default item_format|auto-migrates item files before mutation'

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release gate evidence so far: pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm version:check passed for 2026.5.1; node scripts/release-version.mjs check --tag v2026.5.1 --verify-next --date 2026.5.1 passed; pnpm security:scan found no credential-like secrets; npm pack --dry-run produced @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.5.1 tarball; pnpm release:notes generated /tmp/pm-cli-release-notes.md from CHANGELOG.md and sanitized pm data; targeted workflow/migration tests passed; pnpm test passed 81 files/1087 tests; pnpm test:coverage and node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage both passed with 100% coverage; pnpm smoke:npx passed for 2026.5.1; pm test --run passed for pm-x6ni and pm-yvwt. Validation sweeps report only pre-existing tracker hygiene warnings tracked by pm-e0b5: 18 closed-item resolution backfills, 3 history hash mismatches, and 3 missing linked paths.
